controller_model: Autopilot PX2 Advanced Digital Lighting Controller (APDPX2)

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot PX2 Advanced Digital Lighting Controller (APDPX2)
compatible_devices.compatible_series: Phantom II HPS, Phantom CMH, Phantom Core
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PHPNB1000 (1000W HPS), PHBC3151 (315W CMH), PHMH630 (630W CMH)
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: Proprietary locking mini 3P M-RJ 6P RF-shielded data cable
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Photoperiod scheduling, PPF dimming (wattage or % per zone), sunrise/sunset ramp simulation, temperature-based auto-dimming, over-temp emergency shutdown
compatible_devices.notes: Only works with 'controllable' Phantom and Core fixtures; non-controllable versions are not compatible. Cables included in box. Supports up to 256 HID fixtures per zone (512 total). Checkerboarding HPS+CMH across zones is supported.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot PX2 Advanced Digital Lighting Controller (APDPX2)
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: Proprietary locking mini 3P M-RJ 6P RF-shielded data cable
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Photoperiod scheduling, PPF dimming, sunrise/sunset simulation, temperature-based auto-dimming, over-temp shutdown
compatible_devices.notes: Manufacturer explicitly lists 'controllable Phantom or Core HID fixtures' as compatible; specific Core model numbers not publicly detailed. Same proprietary RJ6P cable used as for Phantom fixtures.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot PX2 Advanced Digital Lighting Controller (APDPX2)
compatible_devices.compatible_series: PHOTOBIO TX, PHOTOBIO MX, PHOTOBIO TX2, PHOTOBIO MX2, PHOTOBIO X, PHOTOBIO T, PHOTOBIO T Duo
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: PHOTOBIO TX 680W, PHOTOBIO MX2 680W, PHOTOBIO TX2 800W
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: Proprietary locking mini 3P M-2P M RF-shielded cable; optional 0-10V cable kit (CHC882000B) for X/M/T/T Duo models
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: PHOTO LOC 0-10V Cable Kit CHC882000B required for PHOTOBIO X, M, T, T Duo series (included or sold separately)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Analog dimming (0-10V), photoperiod scheduling, PPF scheduling, sunrise/sunset simulation, temperature-based auto-dimming
compatible_devices.notes: PX2 supports up to 50 analog LED fixtures per zone (100 total). PHOTOBIO fixtures confirm 'Autopilot PX series (PX2 and above)' compatibility. Two cable types shipped in box; additional kit needed for X/M/T/T Duo analog models.
